tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Earthquakes are among the most destructive natural disasters on Earth, yet they are also one of the least 1.1. _________. They occur when enormous slabs of rock beneath the surface, known 1.2. _________ tectonic plates, suddenly shift and release stored energy. The point underground where the movement begins is called the focus, while the spot directly 1.3. _________ it on the surface is known as the epicentre.

The 1.4. _________ of earthquakes varies greatly from region to region. Countries that lie along plate 1.5. _________, such as Japan, Chile, and Indonesia, experience tremors on an almost daily basis. In 1.6. _________, regions in the middle of tectonic plates rarely feel any seismic activity at all. 1.7. _________, when earthquakes do strike in unexpected locations, the consequences can be devastating because buildings there are seldom designed to 1.8. _________ the shaking.

Despite advances in technology, scientists are still 1.9. _________ to predict exactly when or where the next major earthquake will occur. What they can do, however, is identify high-risk zones and help communities prepare. Investing in earthquake-resistant infrastructure and early 1.10. _________ systems has already saved countless lives around the world.
